files.Title: ToolkitEngine.AppBootstrapperConfig
files.Summary:
Holds the list of subsystems the AppBootstrapper should initialize at startup. Place one instance of this asset inside any Resources folder so it can be loaded with Resources.Load at both runtime and edit-time.

Recommended path: Assets/Resources/AppBootstrapperConfig.asset

files.Title: ToolkitEngine.LockableAttribute
files.Summary: Displays a field in the Inspector with a lock toggle button. When locked (default), the field is read-only. When unlocked, it is editable.

files.Title: Unity.VisualScripting.Count
files.Summary: Executes an action only once, and a different action afterwards.
